attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Adds a destination chain to the supported list.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `chain_id`: [u32] - The chain ID to add as supported.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Authorizes a bridge to mint/burn a specific asset.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `bridge_id`: [b256] - The ID of the bridge to authorize.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `sub_id`: [b256] - The sub ID of the asset to authorize for.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * When the bridge is not registered.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * When the asset is not registered.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Revokes authorization for a bridge to mint/burn a specific asset.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `bridge_id`: [b256] - The ID of the bridge to deauthorize.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `sub_id`: [b256] - The sub ID of the asset to deauthorize for.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Initializes the asset registry contract with the configured minter contract and owner.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * When the contract is already initialized.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * [bool] - True if the chain is supported, false otherwise.

attributes.name: doc-comment

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `origin_chain_id`: [u64] - The chain ID where the original asset exists.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `origin_token_address`: [b256] - The address of the original token contract.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `origin_decimals`: [u8] - The number of decimals the original token uses.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `name`: [String] - The human-readable name of the asset.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * [b256] - The universal sub ID for the registered asset.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * When minter contract is not set.

attributes.name: doc-comment

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `bridge_name`: [String] - The name identifier for the bridge.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `bridge_address`: [Identity] - The address of the bridge contract.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * [b256] - The unique bridge ID generated from the bridge name hash.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Removes a destination chain from the supported list.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `chain_id`: [u32] - The chain ID to remove from supported.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Rescues tokens accidentally sent to the contract.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `asset_id`: [AssetId] - The asset ID of the tokens to rescue.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `recipient`: [Identity] - The address to receive the rescued tokens.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `amount`: [u64] - The amount of tokens to rescue.

arguments: * `rate_limiter_contract`: [ContractId] - The address of the rate limiter contract.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: Withdraws wrapped assets via the fast bridge with fee quote protection.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: This function validates that the current withdrawal fee doesn't exceed

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: the user's expected fee_quote by more than the configured tolerance.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: After validation, it calls the standard withdraw_via_fast_bridge function.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `sub_id`: [b256] - The universal sub ID of the asset to withdraw.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `destination_chain`: [u32] - The chain ID where tokens should be released.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `recipient`: [b256] - The recipient address on the destination chain.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * `fee_quote`: [u64] - The fee quote the user received when preparing the transaction.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * [b256] - The hash of the withdrawal request for tracking.

attributes.name: doc-comment
arguments: * When the current fee exceeds fee_quote by more than the configured tolerance.
